_publications._publicationTitle: Hydroxychloroquine prevents resistance to SHP2 inhibition in NF1-mutant cancers
_publications._context: Kinase enrichment proteomic analysis (MIB/MS) of NF1 MPNST tumors from the NI (Nf1flox/flox;Cdkn2a;CGD) GEMM treated with SHP099 and/or trametinib. PRIDE accession PXD035998. Also used for RNA-seq (GEO GSE283902).

basicInfo.description: Conditional knockout of Nf1 combined with Cdkn2a (Ink4a/Arf) loss, driven by CGD (Nestin-Cre). Abbreviated 'NI' in the Parada lab. Equivalent to Nf1-/-;Ink4a/Arf-/-. Develops NF1-associated malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs).
